response.justification: Strong senior software engineer with 15+ years of experience, open-source contributions (GISCollective), Linux/Unix familiarity, and a track record of mentoring through workshops and talks. However, the role requires German at C1 minimum and the candidate lists only Basic German, which is a hard requirement gap. There is also limited explicit evidence of formal IT architecture leadership, UML proficiency, or managing interdisciplinary teams at an executive level.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance systems
Active open-source founder (GISCollective) aligned with the company's open-source/digital sovereignty focus
Strong teaching/mentoring background via workshops, courses, and dojos
concerns: German listed as only Basic — fails the C1 minimum requirement
No explicit formal leadership/Head-of-Development role or team-management track record shown
Limited evidence of UML proficiency, requirements management, and Python (a desired skill)

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering breadth and open-source leadership
Lack of explicit executive-level leadership experience
